message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant API_Gateway
participant UserRouter
participant Middleware
participant UserController
participant UserDB

actor User

User->>API_Gateway: getUsers(token)
API_Gateway->>UserRouter: withAuth(token)
UserRouter->>Middleware: jwt.verify(token)
Middleware-->>UserRouter: Token Valid

alt [token]
    UserRouter-->>API_Gateway: 'Unauthorized: No token provided (401)'
    API_Gateway-->>UserRouter: 'Unauthorized: No token provided (401)'
end

alt [token != valid]
    UserRouter-->>API_Gateway: 'Unauthorized: Invalid token (401)'
    API_Gateway-->>UserRouter: 'Unauthorized: Invalid token (401)'
end

alt [users.length == 0]
    UserRouter-->>API_Gateway: 'User not found 404'
    API_Gateway-->>UserRouter: 'User not found 404'
end

UserRouter->>UserController: getUsers()
UserController->>UserDB: find()
UserDB-->>UserController: users[]
UserController-->>UserRouter: return(res.status(200), users)
UserRouter-->>API_Gateway: return(res.status(200), users)

@enduml
